headline: Comfort Systems USA Rides AI Data Center Wave With Higher Dividend
summary: Comfort Systems USA (NYSE:FIX) has secured large contracts to supply advanced cooling systems for AI focused data centers, contributing to a rising project backlog. The company reported that these AI related infrastructure projects are supporting revenue growth and signaling structurally higher demand for its services.
